overview: A beautiful single-page professional portfolio and resume website with a pastel Pinterest-inspired design. Features profile photo, about section, GitHub/LinkedIn/coding platform links, certifications, internship projects, active mini projects, and contact info — all with a soft lavender, blush pink, and sky blue color palette.
features: Pastel Pinterest-vibe design with lavender, blush pink, sky blue, and mint palette
Hero section with profile photo in a soft rounded frame
About Me with bio, personal details, and social/platform links
Certifications grid with styled cards and badge areas
Projects showcase split into Internship Projects and Active Mini Projects
Sticky navigation header with smooth scroll
Contact section with clickable Gmail link
Responsive layout — beautiful on mobile, tablet, and desktop
